title: 🧪 Add test for error path in backfillAndFindOverlaps
body:
🎯 **What:** The testing gap addressed
The `backfillAndFindOverlaps` function in `src/lib/status-command-deps.ts` has an untested error path. Specifically, it uses a `try...catch` block that returns `[]` if any exception is thrown when calling `backfillMessagingChannels` or `findAllOverlaps`. This path was not covered by the existing tests because simulating the error required mocking internal module dependencies.

📊 **Coverage:** What scenarios are now tested
A new test file, `src/lib/status-command-deps.error-path.test.ts`, was created. This file imports the source directly and uses `vi.mock` to simulate the failure scenarios before the modules are evaluated. The new tests verify:
- The catch block returns `[]` and swallows the error when `backfillMessagingChannels` throws. It also verifies that `findAllOverlaps` is not reached.
- The catch block returns `[]` and swallows the error when `findAllOverlaps` throws.
- The happy path works correctly when no exceptions are thrown.

✨ **Result:** The improvement in test coverage
The previously untested error path inside `backfillAndFindOverlaps` is now fully covered with focused unit tests. This ensures that the function remains robust and behaves as expected when network, authentication, or transient errors occur, without disrupting the overall `status` command execution.

Signed-off-by: Jules <jules@example.com>
